features.featureTitle: Update the Admin Dashboard page (AdminDashboardPage.tsx) to use the correct admin-authenticated actor for all data queries and mutations (tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, support tickets). Ensure all admin sections call backend queries that return full platform-wide data, not per-user filtered data. Fix the useQueries hooks used in the admin context to pass the admin actor instead of a user actor.

Update the Admin Dashboard tournament management UI to include fields for Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL when creating or editing a tournament. When admin saves these values, the mutation must call the backend update function. Display the current Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL in the tournament detail/edit view.
